title: My Singing Discs
description:
This is a Minecraft mod where you can craft music discs for your favourite songs My Singing Monsters and My Singing Monsters: Dawn Of Fire.

I do not own the songs The
body:
# 
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7047e27d71910d54a7d19a9d0053d42101a4971.png)
# 
 <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DpBxg5wYjxs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

#

**This is a Minecraft mod where you can craft music discs for your favourite songs from My Singing Monsters and My Singing Monsters: Dawn Of Fire.
If there is any issues Let me know on Discord @Sion070 or on Twitter Sion070_  or email me sioninbusiness@gmail.com.**

# 
![1.0.9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d4047a98b1f8a432e906333e1eff271d66b2d72.png)
# 

Disc Updates:
- added wander island hyehehe, Blabbit and cherubble
- Added Galymph to both paironormal carnivals
- T-pirainha to mirror water island
- T-pirainha to water island

New Discs:
- Crystal Islet
- Pomily family band
- Pomily family band (flower)
- Pomily family band (bubblegum)
- BlitherPhish
- BlitherPhish (mecha)
- Waveform
- Waveform (flashy)
- Waveform (steamy)

New Items:
- Pomily family band poster and painting
- BlitherPhish Poster and painting
- Waveform Poster and painting
- Blank Clubbox disc



New Advancements:
- A Crystaline Hand! - Obtain Crystal Islet
- Family song! - Obtain Pomily family band disc
- Flower Power! - Obtain Pomily family band (flower) disc
- Sweet treat! - Obtain Pomily family band (bubble gum) disc
- Kinda Phishy! - Obtain BlitherPhish disc
- Giant Mechanical Obtain Phish! - BlitherPhish (Mecha) Disc
- Turn into a monster! - Obtain Waveform disc
- Flashing Lights! - Obtain Waveform (flashy) disc
- Holographic Madness! - Obtain Waveform (Steamy) disc
  
# 
![disclaimer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24ab9a32b87d63556742a1c6a0746f33ed899acf.png)
#
